data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. LILLY LOUD MOUTH has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing fifth (35.26) in a Grade 5 NP at Sandown. Better than last start and worth following up. 7. ASTON ALLURE showed little early speed at her last couple, the latest finishing fifth (31.58) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 at this track. Has a good record here at this journey. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Key runner on best form. 4. KUNAMA NAMADGI comes off an average run last start when fifth at Bendigo over 500m behind Him Tarzan (28.68) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Should be in this for a long way. 1. MISS SPARKLES is a last start winner who can measure up again.","runners":[3,7,4,1],"exclusive":false}
